title: mentha × allophylla
intro: Mentha × allophylla, also known as pineapple mint, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between spearmint (Mentha spicata) and apple mint (Mentha suaveolens). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mentha × allophylla include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating headaches and fever, and promoting a healthy digestive system. The herbal preparations of pineapple mint include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, relieve stress, and promote a good night's sleep.
